text:
On your list of User Groups, the information for the Reno LUG should be updated as follows:

"""
Reno Linux Users Group (RLUG) [link to http://www.rlug.org]
The Reno Linux Users Group (RLUG) meets monthly in Reno Nevada and discusses the use of BSD and Linux. Visit http://www.rlug.org for more information, where you may also join our mailing list. Located in Reno, NV.
"""


Thanks!
